channel.title: JP on jp's garden
channel.description: Recent content in JP on jp's garden

item.title: Back Home | 3D Cooperative Game
item.description: Back Home is the culmination of my undergraduate thesis Wartime Shadow: Using Game Design to Foster Empathy for War’s Psychological Effects. This is a short, narrative-driven game about a girl finding herself by facing her childhood trauma.

item.title: Cyberpunk Alley | 3D Environment
item.description: As the final requirement of my game art course, we were asked to render any environment or scene of our choice. I decided to go for a cyberpunk aesthetic environment, flush with neon lights and signage, from the view of a dirty, wet alleyway. I used a mix of borrowed textures and self-made materials to decorate my models.

item.title: About
item.description:
Hello! I’m a 4th year CS undergrad at De La Salle University, Manila. I go by voxu or voxu-dev online. I enjoy watching movies, playing videogames and taking photos.

I’m passionate about game design research and love working with similarly passionate people — feel free to reach out if you want to work on something together!
